createAuser_2684b4910b.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: Multiple unit tests in AuthControllerCreateAuserTest failed due to misuse of Mockito’s doNothing().
* Where: AuthControllerCreateAuserTest.java, notably lines 328, 444, 456.
* Why: doNothing() was applied to non-void methods, which is unsupported—Mockito only allows doNothing() on void-returning methods.
* Investigate: Review the test mocks; replace doNothing() with appropriate stubbing (e.g., when(mock.method()).thenReturn(value)), and ensure doNothing() is only used for void methods.,
